Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1037 0 0}That's the nurse's office, not the faculty office.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}C'mon, we don't have time to be wandering around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}Hm? Are you feeling sick or something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}Well, no one's gonna be in there right now anyway. Let's just meet back up with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
